hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath'); echo "$FILE" | grep -iqE '\.(R|r|qmd)$' && command -v air >/dev/null 2>&1 && air format "$FILE" 2>&1 || true

command -v Rscript >/dev/null 2>&1 && Rscript -e 'if (file.exists("renv/activate.R") && requireNamespace("renv", quietly = TRUE)) { status <- renv::status(); if (!isTRUE(status$synchronized)) message("renv drift detected: run renv::status() for details") }' 2>&1 || true

language: Use Japanese for chat conversations, English for writing files
